Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-02-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF THERESA HEDGEPETH'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint:

Grant per stipulation of defendant. Plaintiff must file and serve the first amended complaint; it will not be "deemed filed." Any request to vacate or continue the current trial date must be directed to the Presiding Judge in Department 206. (See SF Local Rule 6.)

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
